workflowId.cachedResultName: SW: Create or Update HubSpot Contact

parameters.jsCode:
const parse = $('Parse Webhook Input').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...parse, contactId: parse.contactId } }];

conditions.leftValue: ={{ (() => { const p = $('Parse Webhook Input').first().json; if (p.createDeal === false || p.createDeal === 'false') return 'no'; if (String(p.hubspotDealId || '').trim()) return 'no'; return 'yes'; })() }}

nodes.name: Append or update row in sheet

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, contactId: $('Build CRM Context').first().json.contactId, dealId: $('Build CRM Context').first().json.dealId || null, enrolledInOutreach: false, kickoffReminderDelayHours: ($('Get Config').first().json.timing && $('Get Config').first().json.timing.websiteKickoffReminderHours) ? $('Get Config').first().json.timing.websiteKickoffReminderHours : 48 }) }}

main.node: Append or update row in sheet
